description: A young male adventurer at the very start of his journey, clearly inspired by a young Nathan Drake / Indiana Jones type paired to match a young Lara Croft — this is the bare starting character, exactly how he looks before any equipment is picked up. He has a strikingly athletic and toned build with broad strong shoulders, defined arms, and a lean powerful frame. Confident, fearless, and intensely badass with a cool rebellious edge. He has sharp, handsome facial features — a strong jaw, piercing intelligent eyes, a determined and slightly smirking expression that shows both wit and toughness. Short-to-medium tousled dark brown hair, windswept and slightly messy. His stance is self-assured and ready — weight on one leg, shoulders back, exuding natural charisma and adventurous spirit. He wears ONLY plain, simple, unremarkable starting clothes in muted natural colors: a fitted but worn plain shirt or tunic (slightly form-fitting to show his athletic physique) and simple trousers with basic boots — strictly in browns, blacks, greys and off-white, nothing colorful or modern. He has NO gear of any kind: no armor, no jacket, no weapons, no holsters, no utility belt, no gloves, no bags — completely unequipped. Not a costume, not a prince. He must look cool, memorable, capable and badass through his face, hair, athletic body, and powerful posture alone. High-quality RPG pixel-art character, clean readable silhouette, strong shape language, expressive face, restrained muted earth-tone palette, full-body character, single centered figure, transparent background.
